title: Asked about aging in office, Trump replies with Harris' bar-exam results
shortDescription: Donald Trump, appearing in Chicago Wednesday, claimed that Kamala Harris did not pass the bar exam. Harris was admitted to the bar in 1990.

title: Donald Trump grilled by moderators at NABJ
shortDescription: Donald Trump was grilled by moderators at the NABJ Convention in Chicago.

title: FLOTUS with Biden before flying to Paris Olympics | Fact check
shortDescription: Jill Biden wasn't in the U.S. and France at the same time. The images show her with Joe Biden in Washington, D.C., on July 24 and in Paris on July 25.

title: Donald Trump defends JD Vance after backlash over 'cat ladies' comment
shortDescription: Trump also sidestepped a question about whether Vance would be ready to serve as president "on Day 1" if necessary.

title: Trump takes spotlight with inflammatory comments to Black journalists
shortDescription: The GOP nominee has been in the background since Harris' White House launch. He just seized the spotlight again by questioning her racial identity.

title: WATCH: Trump stirs backlash with remarks to Black journalists
shortDescription: At the National Association of Black Journalists Convention, former President Donald Trump questioned vice president Kamala Harris' racial identity.

title: Kari Lake wins: Takeaways from Arizona's primary election
shortDescription: Tuesday's primary election solidified some November matches, and offered some tea leaves about questions to come.

title: 'Don't know the exact case': Trump unfamiliar with Sonya Massey death
shortDescription: Donald Trump said he didn't know the 'exact case' when asked about Sonya Massey, a Black woman fatally shot in the face by a sheriff's deputy.

title: Trump speaks at NABJ convention
shortDescription: Former President and 2024 Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump answers questions during the National Association of Black Journalists annual convention in Chicago.

title: Trump questions Harris' racial identity, says she 'happened to turn Black'
shortDescription: Trump, to a chorus of gasps at the NABJ conference, said of Harris: 'I didn't know she was Black.' He also said he didn't know the details of the Sonya Massey case.

title: Trump's Agenda 47 vs Project 2025: What's the difference?
shortDescription: Agenda 47 is an outlined proposal by the Trump campaign for what a second Trump administration would look like. How is it different from Project 2025?

title: VP potential Sen. Mark Kelly turns immigration issue on Trump
shortDescription: In a first TV interview since Joe Biden left the race, VP contender and Arizona Senator Mark Kelly criticized Trump for killing and immigration bill.

title: Biden pushes proposals to crack down on fentanyl trafficking
shortDescription: Biden's new proposals would make fentanyl related substances Schedule 1 drugs and impose harsher penalties on smugglers and traffickers.

title: New drop-off ballot restrictions spark concern among elderly voters
shortDescription: Florida limits absentee drop boxes, making voting harder for elderly and disabled voters. Many other states have also recently restricted drop boxes

title: Kari Lake wins Arizona GOP Senate primary
shortDescription: Kari Lake won the Republican primary handily in Arizona on Tuesday and will now face the Democratic challenger Ruben Gallego in November.

title: Kamala Harris pushes Trump to face her in a debate
shortDescription: Before VP Kamala Harris took the stage at her campaign event in Atlanta on Tuesday, the atmosphere felt more like a party than a political rally.

title: Kamala Harris challenges Trump to debate
shortDescription: Addressing thousands at a rally in Atlanta, Georgia, Kamala Harris challenged Donald Trump to debate her.
